personality_one_liner: An exclusive, cinematic nightlife experience where connections feel electric and premium.

spacing.rule: Generous cinematic spacing. Content must breathe. Sticky primary CTA at bottom above safe area.

do's: Tab bar must be frosted glass
Featured swipe cards metadata overlay (tinted base + blur)
dont's: Avoid glass on dense chat list rows

screens.name: RoomScanner
screens.purpose: Onboarding screen to join a party by scanning a QR code.

states.loading: Centered brand spinner over camera view.
states.empty: Camera viewport with a scan frame and 'Fallback Code' entry.
states.error: Blurry camera feed with an 'Invalid Room Code' error overlay and Retry button.

screens.layout: Camera view takes up the top 70% of the screen. Bottom 30% features a glassmorphic bottom sheet indicating 'Scan to enter Lounge' and a secondary CTA for manual code entry.

screens.name: SwipeDeck
screens.purpose: The main room feed where users swipe on attendees in the same party.

states.empty: Elegant glass illustration indicating 'You've seen everyone in this room!'.
states.error: Error fetching room attendees with a retry button.

screens.layout: Full-screen profile card. Layer 0: expo-image hero photo. Layer 1: linear-gradient scrim (transparent to #09090B at 90%). Layer 2: Minimal metadata (Name, Age, Bio) in the bottom 30%. Bottom action bar floats over the card with two large glassmorphic pill buttons: 'Pass' (uses error color) and 'Like' (uses brandPrimary).

screens.name: MatchModal
screens.purpose: Celebratory full-screen modal when a mutual like occurs.
screens.layout: Heavy blur over the swipe deck background. Two overlapping circular avatars in the center, surrounded by a subtle #10B981 glow. Large Fraunces title 'It's a Match'. Primary CTA 'Send Message' sticky at bottom.

screens.name: ChatList
screens.purpose: List of active chats with matched attendees.

states.empty: Illustration of two empty glasses with 'No matches yet. Keep swiping!'

screens.layout: Glassmorphic sticky header with the Room Name. Standard list items: Avatar (real photo), Name, Last Message, unread dot. Generous vertical spacing.

party_background.alt: people dancing inside room with green lights

swipe_card_1.alt: Young woman in a colorful nightclub setting

swipe_card_2.alt: Stylish woman poses gracefully against vibrant backdrop

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the '6 Glass / Luxe DARK' personality. Do NOT invert to a light theme. The app must be dark, cinematic, and premium.
No indigo, violet, purple, magenta, or blue anywhere in the app. Use the defined #10B981 Emerald Green and #E11D48 Ruby Red.
Every image card in the SwipeDeck MUST have a gradient scrim overlay (Layer 1: transparent at 0% to #09090B at 90%) so text is readable.
Implement the swipe interaction using react-native-gesture-handler and react-native-reanimated. The card should rotate slightly based on swipe direction.
Use glassmorphism (expo-blur) heavily on elevated surfaces: Tab bar, Match modal overlay, floating action buttons.
Use Fraunces (weight 400/500 only) for main titles like 'It's a Match' and Room headers, and Geist for all UI text.
Implement haptics on card swipes (left/right) and successful matches.
